summary: Feature request to expose Skia's tagged PDF accessibility API (PDFTag, SkPDF::Metadata::fStructureElementTreeRoot, SkPDF::SetNodeId) through SkiaSharp's SKDocument wrapper so that developers can produce accessibility-compliant tagged PDF documents.

reproEvidence.environmentDetails: No specific platform — cross-platform PDF generation feature

repoLinks.description: Skia upstream commit from 2018 adding PDFTag, fStructureElementTreeRoot, and SetNodeId APIs
PR #2865 referenced in issue comments — initial tagged PDF implementation builds by mattleibow (May 2024)

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: No tagged PDF C API exists in SkiaApi.generated.cs or SKDocument.cs — the feature is still missing as of the current codebase.

analysis.summary: The request is to wrap Skia's existing tagged PDF structure API (PDFTag, fStructureElementTreeRoot, SetNodeId — present in Skia since 2018) into SkiaSharp. The current SKDocument.cs and SKDocumentPdfMetadataInternal have no fStructureElementTreeRoot field and the generated C API layer has no sk_pdf_tag or sk_canvas_set_node_id functions. The maintainer acknowledged feasibility in 2022, started implementation in PR #2865 (May 2024), but those preview packages have since expired and the feature is not yet shipped.
analysis.rationale: Classified as type/feature-request because tagged PDF is entirely new functionality (not an improvement to an existing SkiaSharp API). area/SkiaSharp because SKDocument is a core SkiaSharp class. backend/PDF is applicable since this is PDF-backend-specific. tenet/compatibility is relevant because this is an accessibility/standards compliance feature. The feature is well-specified and the maintainer has already validated feasibility and started an implementation PR.

codeInvestigation.finding: SKDocument exposes CreatePdf and CreateXps methods and wraps SKDocumentPdfMetadata. There is no tagged PDF API (no structure element tree, node IDs, or PDF tags exposed in any form).

SKDocumentPdfMetadata struct includes Title, Author, Subject, Keywords, Creator, Producer, Creation, Modified, RasterDpi, PdfA, EncodingQuality — but no fStructureElementTreeRoot field for tagged PDF support.

SKDocumentPdfMetadataInternal (the native P/Invoke struct) mirrors SKDocumentPdfMetadata with no structure element tree root or node ID fields — confirming the native C API layer has not been extended for tagged PDF.

The sk_document region exposes only sk_document_abort, sk_document_begin_page, sk_document_close, sk_document_end_page, sk_document_create_pdf_from_stream, sk_document_create_pdf_from_stream_with_metadata, sk_document_create_xps_from_stream. No sk_pdf_tag_t, sk_canvas_set_node_id, or structure element functions are present.

keySignals.text: I tried to review the Skia code and found the following commit from 2018. It contains a test as well that describes the usage of the feature.
keySignals.interpretation: The reporter has done research and identified the exact upstream Skia APIs to wrap: PDFTag, SkPDF::Metadata.fStructureElementTreeRoot, and SkPDF::SetNodeId.

keySignals.text: Looking at the API, it appears fairly straight forward.
keySignals.interpretation: Maintainer confirmed feasibility early on and assigned to self.
Implementation work was started in PR #2865 with initial preview builds available.

keySignals.text: Would it be possible for you to re-publish the package builds?
keySignals.interpretation: The preview packages from PR #2865 have since expired/become unavailable, suggesting PR #2865 has not yet been merged and released.

nextQuestions: What is the current status of PR #2865? Is it still active or was it abandoned?
Does the Skia submodule in the current repo include the C++ tagged PDF API that needs to be wrapped?
Is a new C API shim (sk_pdf_tag_t, sk_canvas_set_node_id) needed in externals/skia/src/c/, or was that added in PR #2865?

resolution.hypothesis: The feature requires: (1) adding C API shims in externals/skia/src/c/ for PDFTag/fStructureElementTreeRoot/SetNodeId, (2) regenerating bindings, (3) adding C# wrapper classes (SKPdfTag, extending SKDocumentPdfMetadata with StructureElementTreeRoot, adding SKCanvas.SetNodeId). PR #2865 was an initial attempt that has stalled.

proposals.title: Resume or rebase PR #2865
proposals.description: The maintainer (mattleibow) started work in PR #2865. Check if it can be rebased onto current main, fix any conflicts, run regeneration, and complete the implementation.

proposals.title: Fresh implementation via add-api skill
proposals.description: If PR #2865 is too stale, use the add-api skill workflow to add C API → binding → C# wrapper from scratch, following the Skia upstream commit at https://skia-review.googlesource.com/c/skia/+/141138/ as reference.

resolution.recommendedReason: The maintainer already validated the approach and produced initial builds. Rebasing is likely faster than reimplementing from scratch.

actionability.reason: Valid well-specified feature request. Native Skia API exists since 2018. Maintainer already assigned and started PR #2865. Feature is not yet merged/shipped. Strong community demand (11 reactions, multiple follow-up comments).

actions.description: Apply feature-request, SkiaSharp core area, and PDF backend labels
Update community on status and reference PR #2865
actions.comment:
Thank you for the detailed feature request and for identifying the upstream Skia APIs involved!

This is still on the roadmap. An initial implementation was started in PR #2865 — if you'd like to try experimental builds, please check that PR for the latest status. The preview packages mentioned in the earlier comment appear to have expired.

The implementation requires wrapping Skia's `PDFTag`, `SkPDF::Metadata::fStructureElementTreeRoot`, and `SkPDF::SetNodeId` through the SkiaSharp C API layer — the maintainer confirmed feasibility and the approach is well understood.

We'll update this issue when the feature is available in an official release.
